title: Valentino Jaramillo - Portfolio
skills-1-description: Advanced experience in C#, Python, and JavaScript for creating efficient and scalable applications.
skills-2-description: Deep knowledge in SQL, PostgreSQL, and Oracle for handling large volumes of data.
skills-3-description: Design and development of RESTful APIs with OpenAPI/Swagger for efficient integration.
skills-4-description: Implementation of CI/CD and process automation with tools like Jenkins and Docker.
skills-5-description: Knowledge in web security practices, vulnerability prevention, and data protection.
skills-6-description: Experience in project management with agile methodologies such as Scrum and Kanban.
hero-text: Software Engineer with over 12 years of experience developing innovative and scalable solutions.
about-text: I am a software developer passionate about technical excellence, efficient problem solving, and continuous improvement. I focus on technical leadership and delivering high-quality solutions. I am committed to constant innovation and improvement, always seeking to stay abreast of the latest technological trends.
experience-item1-description: Designed and developed full-stack solutions under modern architectures, integrating advanced technologies.
experience-item1-tasks: Designed and developed full-stack solutions under modern architectures, integrating Next.js 14 with React 18, TypeScript, and Prisma ORM on PostgreSQL.
Implemented advanced authentication with NextAuth.js and Prisma adapters, ensuring compliance with security standards.
Designed scalable interfaces with Tailwind CSS, Radix UI, and shadcn/ui, improving accessibility and user experience.
Integrated authentication with Firebase Authentication (Google, Apple, email/password) using the Adapter pattern, preparing for a transition to a JWT backend.
Designed and implemented CI/CD pipelines in GitHub Actions, including builds, unit tests, code analysis, and deployments.
Implemented internationalization (ES/EN/FR), local notifications, and optional analytics (Firebase Analytics + Crashlytics).
Improved delivery quality through unit tests, widget tests, and continuous integration, achieving high levels of code coverage.
experience-item2-description: Leadership in enterprise architecture definition, full-stack development, and application modernization.
experience-item2-tasks: Led the definition of enterprise architecture, applying microservices principles and decoupling to ensure scalability.
Developed critical new functionalities in C#, Python, React, .NET Core, and JavaScript, achieving a 25% reduction in geospatial process execution times.
Implemented documented RESTful APIs with Swagger/OpenAPI, improving interoperability between internal and external systems.
Integrated CI/CD pipelines with Azure DevOps, enabling automatic deployments in QA and production environments with safe rollback.
Led security initiatives in the development cycle, applying OWASP and static code reviews.
Provided technical mentorship to teams of up to 10 developers, strengthening best practices and design patterns.
Coordinated the migration of legacy applications to modern architectures based on Docker containers.
experience-item3-description: Design and development of advanced geospatial solutions, system modernization, and agile team leadership.
experience-item3-tasks: Designed and developed advanced geospatial solutions integrating RESTful APIs and GIS libraries for public and private sector clients.
Implemented a real-time interactive map system in React, reducing load and query latency by 30%.
Migrated legacy systems to .NET Core, increasing scalability and reducing infrastructure costs by 20%.
Led teams in projects with Scrum methodologies, ensuring high-value iterative deliveries.
Coordinated the integration of secure authentication systems for corporate clients, guaranteeing compliance with cybersecurity standards.
Participated in the definition of hybrid architectures (on-premise and cloud) to guarantee operational continuity.
Documented technical solutions and provided specialized training to clients and internal teams.
Led key software development projects for geospatial solutions.
Implementation of secure and quality practices in code development.
Development of new functionalities in C#, Python, React, .Net.Core, JavaScript.
Coordination of agile teams under the Scrum methodology.
experience-item4-description: Application development for the electricity sector, database optimization, and system integration.
experience-item4-tasks: Developed web and desktop applications for the electricity sector, using C#, Windows Forms, Oracle, and SQL Server.
Implemented improvements in SQL query performance, reducing response times in critical reports by up to 40%.
Designed SOAP/REST APIs that integrated billing systems with monitoring platforms.
Elaborated unit and integration tests, increasing delivery stability by 20%.
Collaborated with business analysts to convert requirements into effective technical solutions.
experience-item5-description: Leading complex improvements, quality assurance, and performance optimization in the energy sector.
experience-item5-tasks: Led the development and implementation of complex improvements in software focused on the energy and geographic sectors.
Designed technical solutions in collaboration with the team, improving project efficiency by 20%.
Performed automated testing, ensuring 98% compliance with software requirements.
Optimized application performance, reducing response time by 15%.
Implemented peer code reviews to ensure quality and comply with industry best practices.
Provided technical support to end-users and team members, resolving critical issues quickly.
Development of new functionalities in C#, Python, Node, Dojo, .Net.Core, JavaScript.
experience-item6-title: Junior Developer - Evolutions Services and Consulting
experience-item6-description: Development of new functionalities, process optimization, and quality assurance in web applications.
experience-item6-tasks: Developed and implemented new functionalities and improvements in web applications using C#, JavaScript, and SQL Server.
Reduced bug resolution time by 25% by optimizing debugging and monitoring processes.
Managed source code versions and ensured proper documentation for maintenance and future implementations.
Implemented unit tests, increasing software stability by 30%.
Collaborated in bug fixing and performance optimization of business-critical applications.
